column1: # Hardware-capability fingerprints for GPU video-encode generations.
# This file ships PRIOR-ONLY capability metadata sourced from primary
# vendor documentation. It deliberately contains NO benchmark numbers
# (throughput
# docs/research/0088-hardware-capability-priors-2026-05-08.md for the
# rationale (the contributor-pack digest's category 1 NO-GO finding:
# benchmark numbers leak biased priors into the predictor).
# Every row is verified against a vendor primary source on
# verified_date=2026-05-08. Wikipedia / community wikis are NOT
# acceptable as primary sources. Rows that could not be verified are
# omitted rather than shipped with placeholder data. Notably absent:
# Hopper (NVIDIA H100/H200) ships zero NVENC engines and is therefore
# outside the scope of an encode-capability fingerprint table.
# Schema:
#   arch_name                  short kebab-case architecture name
#   vendor                     intel|amd|nvidia
#   gen_year                   year the architecture's first product
#                              shipped at retail
#   codecs_supported           pipe-separated list of HW-encode codecs
#                              actually exposed by the encode block
#                              (decode-only codecs excluded)
#   max_resolution_per_codec   pipe-separated codec=WxH pairs covering
#                              every codec in codecs_supported
#   encoding_blocks            count of independent HW encode engines
#                              on the highest-tier SKU of the gen
#   tensor_cores               1 if the gen exposes a matrix /
#                              tensor / XMX path
#   npu_present                1 if the SoC class for this gen ships
#                              an on-die NPU (separate from GPU
#                              tensor units)
#   driver_min_version         oldest production driver branch that
#                              exposes the encode block at the listed
#                              capabilities (vendor-specific format)
#   source_url                 primary vendor URL the row was
#                              verified against
#   verified_date              ISO-8601 date the row was verified
arch_name
alchemist
battlemage
rdna3
rdna4
ada-lovelace
blackwell
